properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: The King is here, the King is here You're alive inside of me The King is here, the King is here Love will never ever leave :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We worship and we praise We lift Your holy name We rejoice for our King is here We're living to proclaim You've opened Heaven's gates We rejoice for our King is here

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are here, You are here You come in power and majesty God, You are here, You are here Every heart has been set free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: We worship and we praise We lift Your holy name We rejoice for our King is here We're living to proclaim You've opened Heaven's gates We rejoice for our King is here :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The King is here, the King is here Hallelujah, God You're here The King is here, the King is here Hallelujah, God You're here

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: We are captured by You Surrender to You We'll never be same Cause You are here We're alive to praise You, Give our glory to You We'll never be same Cause You are here :/

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: The King is here, the King is here Hallelujah, God You're here The King is here, the King is here Hallelujah, God You're here :/

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The King is here, the King is here Hallelujah, God You're here

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We worship and we praise We lift Your holy name We rejoice for our King is here (Thank You Jesus) We're living to proclaim You've opened Heaven's gates We rejoice for our King is here (It's Jesus, it's Jesus)
